name: The Occult History of the Third Reich
original_name: The Occult History of the Third Reich
overview: Documents both the influences of alternative belief systems on the Nazi ideology and Hitler's personal philosophy, and the history and development of the ideas and symbols that would be used along with eugenicist racial politics to perpetrate the murder and oppression of millions during World War II.

trailers.title: Adolf Hitler | Occult History of the Third Reich | Full Documentary
